column1: Ordinary ships have trouble travelling through the Atlantic Ocean.
The Yamal uses nuclear energy to melt ice in its path.
The materials the ship is built of help it travel through the Atlantic Ocean.
The Nenets sometimes travel using the Yamal.
The Yamal was built to help other ships travel through the Arctic.
The only ship to travel to the North Pole in the year 2000 was the Yamal.
The Yamal carried a total of 18 Arctic explorers during its 2009 travels.
The picture of the mouth is there to make people feel scared.
